refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as per acceptance criteria.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs, and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates accessible via system logs or reports.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation using worksite data models
Database schema for performance requirements and history
Version control and update management logic
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated software module implementing algorithmic derivation, database recording, and update management logic

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithm and database schema
Update management logic dependent on both derivation and recording
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows or safety requirements demand isolation.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the overall NGHE system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time worksite mission context data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates and history synchronization

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core logic resides here; low diffusion as functionality is centralized
Minimal containment; would cause diffusion if assigned here due to unrelated scope
No containment; assigning here would cause high diffusion and poor architectural fit
Limited containment; safety services interface but not core to performance requirement derivation

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update history.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module if other unrelated functions are added
Interface complexity with Telemetry and Network Link may increase integration risk
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider splitting update management if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical cohesion and traceability, satisfying acceptance criteria.

diffusion_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if update management grows
Interface management with Telemetry and Network Link requires careful design
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best IM boundary; diffusion risks are manageable with modular design.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via system logs, traceability matrices, and interface testing with Telemetry and Tasking.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine update management logic modularity if complexity increases
Define interface protocols explicitly for Telemetry and Network Link

decision.justification: Overall decomposition and assignments are sound but update management modularity and interface definitions need refinement to reduce diffusion risk and improve clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To modularize update management logic and explicitly define interface protocols to reduce diffusion and integration risks.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated logic without performance degradation
open_risks: Interface complexity leading to integration delays
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution module
Interface protocol specifications and test results
